sentences.arabic: أَخَذَتِ الرِّيحُ قُبَّعَةَ الطِّفْلِ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Vjetar je odnio dječakovu kapu na plaži.
sentences.translationEn: The wind took the child's hat on the beach.

sentences.arabic: رَكَضَ الطِّفْلُ خَلْفَهَا وَلَكِنَّهَا وَقَعَتْ فِي الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je trčalo za njom ali je pala u more.
sentences.translationEn: The child ran after it but it fell into the sea.

sentences.translation: Dijete se nasmijalo i reklo: Kapa je otišla!
sentences.translationEn: The child laughed and said: The hat is gone!

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى لَهُ أَبُوهُ قُبَّعَةً جَدِيدَةً مِنَ الدُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Otac mu je kupio novu kapu u prodavnici.
sentences.translationEn: His father bought him a new hat from the shop.
